name: Chocolate Heath Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to the instructions on the box packaging.
2. As soon as the cake is removed from the oven, punch holes in the top of the cake using a straw.
3. Spread sweetened condensed milk over the top of the cake.
4. Sprinkle the Heath Bits 'O Brickle evenly across the surface of the cake.
5. Allow the cake to cool completely.
6. Spread Cool Whip on top of the cooled cake.
7. Mash the frozen Heath Bars using a hammer and spread them on top of the cake.
8. Store the cake in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
